> **v2 FEATURE — NOT AVAILABLE IN v1.** Do not invoke `/diagnose` in v1 sessions. This is a future repo-wide diagnostic command. Current task-scoped diagnosis uses TaskManifest + EvaluationRecord + validators.

# /diagnose

Structured bug investigation: reproduce → hypothesise → instrument → fix → post-mortem. Hands off the fix to /write-plan or /quick-task.
